why_needed: Core historical fact table for demand, no-show, price, and Kent-Leg analysis.
Canonical operational capacity table for road time, mileage, and Kent-Leg output at vehicle-day grain.
Historical cost and margin reference for economic calibration.
Higher-acuity and SecureCare economics are part of the charter gates and design notes.
Minimum viable prospective scenario input table for MVP demonstrations.
Stabilizes contract concentration and payer-level reimbursement analysis without relying on the duplicate raw sheet.
Needed for later active-time diagnostics, but not required for the minimum viable subset if join issues remain.
Helpful for mode reconciliation and trip-count validation, but not required as the primary fact source.
